criteria.B: Presented; identifies one from either set.
criteria.E: Identifies and names 'one' and 'many' from set of counters.

criteria.B: Presented; identifies at least one of three.
criteria.I: Identifies at least two of the three.
criteria.E: Identifies and names 'more', 'less' and 'equal' from sets of counters.

criteria.B: Presented; identifies one from either set.
criteria.E: Identifies and names 'most' and 'least' from sets of counters.

criteria.B: Presented; traces with a palm grip and frequent lifts.
criteria.I: Adjusts to a pincer grip; traces with occasional lifts.
criteria.P: Maintains pincer grip; traces most without lifting, slowing at the turns.
criteria.E: Traces the full pattern continuously in one direction.

criteria.B: Presented; traces with a palm grip and frequent lifts.
criteria.I: Adjusts to a pincer grip; traces with occasional lifts.
criteria.P: Maintains pincer grip; traces most without lifting, slowing at the turns.
criteria.E: Traces the full pattern continuously in one direction.

criteria.B: Presented; slots insets by trial and error.
criteria.I: Holds with pincer grip; visually compares and places 2 or 3 insets.
criteria.P: Visually compares and places most insets.
criteria.E: Slots all insets by visual comparison independently.
